rollback_policy.description: A local release is refused if its phase rank is older than release-history.json latest_version or if its key_id is not trusted.

releases.notes: Rollback protection, key-id trust metadata, and advisory update check.
Phase 8 local-only recovery snapshots, checksum sidecars, safe archive verification, recovery drill, and human restore plans.

releases.summary: First-run activation guide, seven-day onboarding path, and activation readiness checker.
Public Launch Pack assets and launch readiness checker for safe no-PHI sharing.

doctrine: Agents propose. Humans judge. Nurses steward.
